title: Force Harvester
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Citation}} {{Weapon |image=[[File:Force_Harvester.jpg]] |name=Force Harvester |manufacturer= |model= |type=[[Superweapon/Legends|Superweapon]] |culture= |creators=[[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]]''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' |created= |destroyed=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] |discovered=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] |owners= |locations= |cost= |value= |shape= |size= |material= |length=Approx. 20 [[Meter/Legends|meters]][[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 78|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 78]] |width=Approx. 20 meters |diam= |height= |weight= |protection= |crew= |capacity= |range= |inscription= |markings= |purpose= |heritage= |affiliation=*[[Brotherhood of the Sith]] *[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] }} {{Quote|You're a Jedi, right? Wow, I hate to imagine what effect Dooku's Force Harvester is gonna have on you.''"
"''Force Harvester? That's what Dooku was digging up on Raxus Prime?''"
"''Yep. It's some sort of ancient Sith artifact that absorbs the Force from living things. Dooku is using it as a power source. But for what? I have no idea.|[[Bera Kazan]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]|[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' video game]]}} An ancient [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] artifact that served as a power source for the [[Dark Reaper]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]], the '''Force Harvester''' was a large swirling globe that produced a destructive form of purple energy that drained the living [[The Force/Legends|force]] from anyone it came in contact with within a small area, producing a concentrated form of dark side energy that would be used to power the Dark Reaper. However, it could not harvest a [[Wound in the Force/Legends|wound in the Force]]. When in use, the Harvester also radiated a bright purple glow. It was originally a device created by [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]] to operate the Dark Reaper during the [[Old Sith Wars]], however, the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Ulic Qel-Droma/Legends|Ulic Qel-Droma]] found a way to it and clues about the Reaper and the Harvester were scattered across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. For thousands of years, the Force Harvester lay hidden beneath the piles of intergalactic debris on the garbage world of [[Raxus Prime/Legends|Raxus Prime]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] uncovered the device and escaped the planet with it shortly before the [[Conquest of Raxus Prime]]. The Force Harvester was brought to the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]], located in the [[Kashyyyk system/Legends|Kashyyyk system]], to test on the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] tribes that resided there. [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Bera Kazan]] escaped the Harvester on a stolen [[Single Trooper Aerial Platform/Legends|STAP]] and called in [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] forces to stop the Harvester. This did not stop the [[Dark Reaper crisis]] however, for [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] had escaped with the Harvester and used it on other worlds such as [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]], [[Agamar/Legends|Agamar]], and [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]]. Once filled with enough energy, Count Dooku traveled to the moon of the distant planet of [[Thule/Legends|Thule]]. There it was attached to the underbelly of the Dark Reaper, and after thousands of years, the ancient Sith weapon was operational yet again. During the [[Battle of Thule]], the Harvester was targeted by Anakin Skywalker during the final encounter with the Dark Reaper. The Harvester fell to his blasterfire, which caused the Reaper to collapse. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'' video game]] {{1st}} *''[[Boba Fett: Crossfire]]'' ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]] *{{FactFile|107|SUR 3-6|The Survival of Boba Fett}} *{{FactFile|116|DOO 5-8|Count Dooku}} *''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' {{C|Erroneously mentioned as the "Dark Reaper superweapon"}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] *''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' {{Imo}} *{{DB|location|raxusprime|Raxus Prime}} *''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' {{C|Erroneously mentioned as the "Dark Reaper"}} *{{FactFile2014|6|22 BBY 75-80|Dark Side Influence}} *{{FactFile2014|15|RAX 1-4|Raxus Prime}} *{{FactFile2014|27|FET 9-12|Boba Fett}} {{Imo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Machtabsorber |es=Cosechador de la Fuerza }} [[Category:1st-century BBY archaeological discoveries]] [[Category:Confederacy military]] [[Category:Sith weapons]] [[Category:Superweapons]]
